## Checklist

- [ ] Is this code used by ≥2 consumers today? (If not, consider keeping it downstream.)
- [ ] Does this change pull in new dependencies? (If yes, justify.)
- [ ] Have contract tests been updated?
- [ ] Does this change the schema? (If yes, it must be additive or have both-team sign-off.)
